meta.title: DreamWise AI — AI Agent Consulting for SMEs
meta.description: We help small and medium businesses become agent-driven. Custom AI agent development, readiness assessment, and ongoing optimization.
meta.keywords: AI agent consulting, AI transformation, SME AI, business automation, AI agents

hero.title: Your Business, Powered by AI Agents.
hero.slogan: The Future is Agent-Driven. We'll Get You There.

problem.headline: Why Most SMEs Struggle with AI Adoption
problem.subtext: You're not alone. These are the three barriers we hear every day.
problem.card1Desc: AI feels overwhelming without a roadmap. Most companies don't know where to begin.
problem.card2Desc: Off-the-shelf AI tools miss your specific workflows and create more problems than they solve.
problem.card3Desc: AI projects stall without dedicated expertise. Your team is busy — who drives this forward?

services.headline: What We Do
services.subtext: Three services. One complete journey from AI-curious to agent-driven.
services.s1Desc: We audit your processes, identify high-impact automation opportunities, and deliver a clear AI roadmap.
services.s2Desc: We design and deploy AI agents tailored to your workflows — from customer service to internal operations.
services.s3Desc: Ongoing monitoring, fine-tuning, and iteration to ensure your agents deliver measurable business results.

howItWorks.headline: From Zero to Agent-Driven in 3 Steps
howItWorks.step1Desc: We map your current processes and identify where AI agents create the most value. Output: your AI roadmap.
howItWorks.step2Desc: We develop and integrate custom agents into your existing systems. No disruption to daily operations.
howItWorks.step3Desc: We monitor performance, tune your agents, and continuously improve outcomes.

caseStudies.headline: Real Results for Real Businesses
caseStudies.subtext: See how companies like yours are transforming with AI agents.
caseStudies.scenario1: An online retailer deployed a customer service agent that handles returns, tracking, and FAQs — 24/7, in multiple languages.
caseStudies.scenario2: A regional logistics company automated order tracking and exception handling, freeing ops teams from repetitive queries.
caseStudies.scenario3: A consulting firm built an internal knowledge agent that answers HR, policy, and project questions instantly.

cta.headline: Ready to Become Agent-Driven?
cta.subtext: Start with a free 30-minute assessment call.
cta.successTitle: Thanks! We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
cta.errorMsg: Something went wrong. Please try again.

testimonials.headline: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.q1: DreamWise AI helped us identify automation opportunities we didn't even know existed. Within 6 weeks, our customer service team was handling 3x the volume without adding headcount.
testimonials.q2: We tried generic AI tools for months with no results. DreamWise built something specifically for our logistics workflow — the difference was night and day.
testimonials.q3: The ROI was visible within the first month. Our knowledge agent handles 80% of internal questions, freeing our HR team to focus on what really matters.

about.label: About DreamWise AI
about.headline: Why DreamWise AI?
about.mission: We started DreamWise AI with a simple belief: AI agents shouldn't be reserved for Fortune 500 companies. SMEs deserve the same transformative technology — delivered pragmatically, affordably, and without the consulting-speak.
about.vp1Desc: No bloated implementations. We move fast and focus on what matters.
about.vp2Desc: We build the agents ourselves. No outsourcing, no middlemen.
about.vp3Desc: We define success metrics upfront. You know exactly what you're getting.
about.cardQuote: We believe every business deserves access to AI — without the complexity.
